title: チャンピオンズCの後に・Fuu！活☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That was it. All my power... Everything I've got!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: How... was it? Did you all see me sparkle?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
You sparkled like no other!
Woooooo!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So many smiling faces! Haha, I see some tears
too...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, now! ☆ I hope you know I can see those
faces, guys!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Keep those smiles on till the very end!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Until next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon stands tall amid the applause. She
waves at the crowd with a big smile. There's no
doubt about it...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thank you, everyone! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Take a good look! ☆ I'm totally back! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I know I worried you before, but I'm fine now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm sure...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
When I saw all those smiling faces, I finally
understood what you meant.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I saw how they were looking at me. Their eyes
were sparkling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I could see that clear as day today... For the first
time in a long time.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
To draw everyone's undivided attention like
that... There's no doubt I was sparkling! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And I'll sparkle even more at the Tokyo
Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It's going to be a performance for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon is back in high spirits. With the
grand stage of the Tokyo Daishoten now on the
horizon, she's full of pep.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's a proposal I have in mind to boost her
motivation further. Namely...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You want me to do a holiday handshake event?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My hope is that if Smart Falcon can get up close
and personal with her fans, she'll see just how
much she's really enchanted them.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oooh, sounds fun!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, I've never put on a big fan
event.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I'm the kind of Umadol you can approach
on the street! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But that's whatever!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Let's do it! Meet and greet, here we come! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I really hope all my fans turn up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to hold a fan event before
tackling our final race goal, the Tokyo Daishoten.
